message:
fix(http2): prevent CONTINUATION bomb attack with header block size limit (bd-2c9t)

All 3 HTTP/2 server paths accumulated CONTINUATION frame payloads into
header_block without any size limit, allowing an attacker to exhaust
server memory before HPACK decoding. Added MAX_HEADER_BLOCK_SIZE (128 KiB)
guard in all CONTINUATION assembly loops. Added E2E regression test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
